description: Vendor configuration for TNG Property Management work order email processing. Fill all [PLACEHOLDER] values before first run.

naming_convention.format: Investor Last Name – Address – Tenant Name – Vendor – Date

vendors.notes: Appliance vendor. Subject lines clearly indicate estimate vs. approved per Nick.
Primary maintenance vendor. Handles approximately 75% of all work orders. Approximately 95% acceptance rate.

dedup.notes: Duplicate prevention uses the Gmail search time window (newer_than:1d) combined with tracking processed message IDs during each run. No Gmail labels are created or modified. Nick's Gmail stays untouched.

google_drive.notes: File attachments following naming convention into: Investor Name/Property Address/Work Completed/. Enable when Drive integration is ready.

appfolio.notes: AppFolio integration TBD. Nick creating a dedicated Claude user login with full permissions.
